PixiJS V5 Tutorial (13) - Graphics (1): Drawing Shapes
Now we're going to draw some geometry with PIXI, and at the end we'll try to pull together the tricks from the earlier chapters.

Way back in an earlier chapter I mentioned that PixiJS is basically a framework built on top of Canvas. So if you already know Canvas and have some grounding in it, this stuff is pretty easy to pick up. PIXI ships its own drawing API, and the API for geometric shapes is almost identical to plain Canvas.
For every shape, the first thing you always do is instantiate

Time to draw some geometry with PIXI. In this post we'll go through drawing shapes with PixiJS Graphics — outlines, rectangles, fills — and then tie it back to the interaction tricks from earlier chapters so a shape becomes something you can actually click.
